rationale: The study is described as "A pre-registered randomized controlled trial" where "Participants completed an assessment task without AI to establish baseline competency, then were randomly assigned to either a treatment group receiving access to a Gen AI tool (GPT-4o web applications) or a control group without AI access." This is a randomized trial conducted with real organizational staff in what appears to be their work context, but the task-based nature and controlled experimental setup does not clearly indicate a field experiment in the sense of observing real work outcomes.
